# Feature: MVE Render Line Service (#22)

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-06-24 -->

## Intent

Orchestrierung: MVE-Line rendern → AudioJob mit **Script-Snapshot** → `VoiceEngineAdapter` → 1–N Takes persistieren; Line-Status auf `rendered` (PRD §25.2, §22.3).

Roadmap: MVE Epic — MVP 0.2 (#22); UI in #23.

## Happy Path

- [ ] Service `renderMveLine` lädt Line + VoiceProfile des Charakters
- [ ] Job enthält eingefrorenen `scriptSnapshot` (Line + Voice + Direction)
- [ ] Adapter rendert 1–3 Takes (Default 1); Takes in SQLite `ready`
- [ ] Erster erfolgreicher Take wird `selectedTakeId`; Line `status=rendered`
- [ ] Unit-Test mit DummyAdapter ohne Sidecar

## Edge Cases

- [ ] Line ohne Text → DE-Fehler, kein Job
- [ ] Charakter ohne VoiceProfile → DE-Fehler
- [ ] Paralleler Render derselben Line (`processing` Job) → abgelehnt
- [ ] Line während Job editiert → Job nutzt Snapshot, nicht Live-Line
- [ ] Alle Takes fehlgeschlagen → Job `failed`, Line `failed`

## Regression

- [ ] Voice-Preview (#6) unverändert
- [ ] MVE Line-Text/Regie speichern (#5) unverändert
- [ ] Kein raw `synthesizeLocal` in UI — nur Service + Adapter

## Assumptions

- Take-UI (#23) folgt separat; dieser Slice liefert Service + Hook only
- Cloud-Render: `localNotSupported` (kein Functions-Route MVP)
- Default `takeCount=1`, max 3

## Implementation Notes

- `src/lib/multi-voice-engine/render/create-render-snapshot.ts` — frozen Line+Voice snapshot
- `src/lib/multi-voice-engine/render/render-line.ts` — `renderMveLine()` + `MveRenderLineError`
- `src/lib/mve/render-mve-line.ts` — wires adapters/CRUD
- `src/hooks/useMveLineRender.ts` — hook with global loading progress (UI in #23)
- Tests: `render/__tests__/render-line.test.ts` (4 tests, DummyAdapter)
- Deferred: Take-UI (#23)
